parameters.query:
UPDATE events SET status='processing'
                WHERE id IN (
                    SELECT id FROM events
                    WHERE type='macro' AND status='pending'
                    ORDER BY ts ASC
                    LIMIT 1
                    FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
                )
                RETURNING id AS event_id, ts, source, instrument, payload;

INSERT INTO signals_v2 (instrument, timeframe, bias, confidence, entry, sl, tp, r_multiple, agents_fired, rationale, knowledge_refs, strategy_tag)
                VALUES ('{{ $json.instrument }}',
                        '{{ $json.timeframe }}',
                        '{{ $json.bias }}',
                        {{ $json.confidence }},
                        {{ $json.entry === null ? 'NULL' : $json.entry }},
                        {{ $json.sl === null ? 'NULL' : $json.sl }},
                        {{ $json.tp === null ? 'NULL' : "ARRAY[" + $json.tp.join(',') + "]::numeric[]" }},
                        {{ $json.r_multiple === null ? 'NULL' : $json.r_multiple }},
                        ARRAY['MacroAgent']::text[],
                        '{{ JSON.stringify($json.rationale).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
                        ARRAY[{{ ($json.knowledge_refs || []).map(r => "'" + r.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::text[],
                        '{{ $json.strategy_tag }}')
                RETURNING id, ts;
UPDATE events SET status='processed', processed_at=now() WHERE id='{{ $('Parse Signal').first().json.event_id }}';

SELECT macro_regime, risk_sentiment, fed_phase, yield_curve_spread::text AS yield_curve_spread,
       vix_level::text AS vix_level, dxy_trend, confidence::text AS regime_confidence,
       reasoning, timestamp::text AS regime_ts
FROM regime_state ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ON (indicator)
                                indicator, value::text AS value,
                                previous_value::text AS previous_value,
                                change_pct::text AS change_pct,
                                timestamp::text AS indicator_ts
                         FROM macro_indicators
                         WHERE source='fred'
                         ORDER BY indicator, timestamp DESC

UPDATE events SET status='processing'
                WHERE id IN (
                    SELECT id FROM events
                    WHERE type='macro' AND status='pending'
                    ORDER BY ts ASC
                    LIMIT 1
                    FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
                )
                RETURNING id AS event_id, ts, source, instrument, payload;

INSERT INTO signals_v2 (instrument, timeframe, bias, confidence, entry, sl, tp, r_multiple, agents_fired, rationale, knowledge_refs, strategy_tag)
                VALUES ('{{ $json.instrument }}',
                        '{{ $json.timeframe }}',
                        '{{ $json.bias }}',
                        {{ $json.confidence }},
                        {{ $json.entry === null ? 'NULL' : $json.entry }},
                        {{ $json.sl === null ? 'NULL' : $json.sl }},
                        {{ $json.tp === null ? 'NULL' : "ARRAY[" + $json.tp.join(',') + "]::numeric[]" }},
                        {{ $json.r_multiple === null ? 'NULL' : $json.r_multiple }},
                        ARRAY['MacroAgent']::text[],
                        '{{ JSON.stringify($json.rationale).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
                        ARRAY[{{ ($json.knowledge_refs || []).map(r => "'" + r.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::text[],
                        '{{ $json.strategy_tag }}')
                RETURNING id, ts;
UPDATE events SET status='processed', processed_at=now() WHERE id='{{ $('Parse Signal').first().json.event_id }}';

SELECT macro_regime, risk_sentiment, fed_phase, yield_curve_spread::text AS yield_curve_spread,
       vix_level::text AS vix_level, dxy_trend, confidence::text AS regime_confidence,
       reasoning, timestamp::text AS regime_ts
FROM regime_state ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ON (indicator)
                                indicator, value::text AS value,
                                previous_value::text AS previous_value,
                                change_pct::text AS change_pct,
                                timestamp::text AS indicator_ts
                         FROM macro_indicators
